title: Missing "Data Labels" option in Line Charts (Cumulative)

posts.author: RaphaelMartins (Raphael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I am currently setting up a cumulative Line Chart to track my Actual Revenue vs. Target Revenue.

I need to display the fixed values (labels) directly on the chart points, but I cannot find the ‘Show data labels’ option in the ‘Display’ settings for the Line Chart widget. It seems to be missing from the menu entirely.

Is there any workaround to enable data labels on Line Charts, or is this a known platform limitation? Having the numbers visible is critical for my team’s reporting.

Thanks for the help!

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RaphaelMartins !

At the moment, the Line Chart widget in monday dashboards doesn’t support displaying data labels directly on the points. That option isn’t available in the widget settings, so the values won’t appear on the chart itself.

A common workaround is enabling the hover tooltip so users can see the exact value when they move over a point. Some teams also place a Numbers widget or table-style widget next to the chart so the exact figures are visible alongside the visual trend.

If having the values permanently visible on the chart is important for reporting, it’s worth sharing that request with monday’s support or product team, since dashboard visualization options are updated over time based on user feedback.
